text: The Red Harbor Syndicate moved funds through wallet addr-B1 following a transfer observed from server 203.0.113.10. Analysts link RHS to Marek Voss.
Traffic from 203.0.113.10 correlated with panel.example-c2.net. Contact email logistics@grey-ferry.example was recovered. Grey Ferry Logistics coordinated shipping for the network.
MV Nightjar loitered near 9.281,-79.921 before a rendezvous. The Nightjar is associated with Grey Ferry Logistics.
Marek Voss used wallet addr-B1 and referenced hash e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855 in a paste.
Unrelated maritime advisory: MV Petrel reported engine trouble near port. No known links to trafficking.
